---
title: "sea lion 127 final"
format: pdf
pdf: default
gmf: default
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# read in tide and survery data
library(here)
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
tides <- read.csv("data/tides.csv")
surveys <- read.csv("data/surveys.csv")
```

```{r}
# combine date and time into one column
tides$date_time <- paste(tides$Date, tides$Time, sep = "-")
```

```{r}
m.tides <- lm(Pred ~ date_time, data = tides)
y_new = approx(tides$x, tides$y, xout=2025/05/01-17:43)
```

![]()
